items.title: /leadgen/event accepts interaction events (no more 400)
items.precondition: Local backend on :3000 (tsx watch) with a valid LEADGEN_TRACKING_KEY
steps: 2. POST /api/leadgen/event with X-Leadgen-Key + a UUID session_id for each event name
items.expected: The 5 previously-rejected names (cta_clicked_create_account, cta_clicked_strategy_call, email_field_focused, email_field_blurred_empty, audit_retried) return 200; unknown names + inherited members (toString) still 400.
items.evidence: Unit 7/7 pass. Live: cta_clicked_create_account=200, audit_retried=200, email_field_focused=200, landed=200 (control), bogus_event_xyz=400, toString=400. Committed 4d3632ca.
items.notes: Interaction events record without advancing final_stage (isProgressionStage=false).

items.title: Reproduce + classify the ?audit_id= route hang
items.expected: Either reproduce a real hang (→ fix in T3) or refute it.
items.evidence: Refuted: cold ?audit_id= load rendered the full dashboard with no hang on a clean browser. Earlier timeout = accumulated headless state after many heavy audits, not a product defect. Cold-mount code path has no sync loop.
items.notes: Soft note: dashboard is iframe/animation-heavy; lazy-mounting the Google Maps embed is a future perf nicety, not a bug.

items.title: Fix the hang (conditional on T2)
items.precondition: Only if T2 found a real hang
steps: N/A — T2 classified the hang as a test artifact, so no fix is warranted
items.evidence: Not needed — T2 refuted a real hang. No code change.
